flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lamar Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lamar Institute of Technology rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (54.3% → 68.4%).
